message:
fix(web): add siteName, locale, creator to child OG/Twitter metadata

Next.js replaces the entire openGraph/twitter object when a child layout
defines one — it does NOT shallow-merge individual fields from the parent.
This caused complete-guide and core-flywheel to lose og:site_name,
og:locale, and twitter:creator that the root layout provides, even though
the root homepage had them (and works on X).

Now both child layouts explicitly include siteName, locale, and creator
so their meta tags match the root page's structure exactly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
